results.title: War update: 302 clashes on front line over past day, fiercest fighting on Pokrovsk, Huliaipole fronts
results.description: There were 302 combat engagements between Ukraine’s Defense Forces and Russian troops over the past day, May 30. Ukrainian defenders repelled 46 enemy assaults each in the Pokrovsk and Huliaipole sectors.

results.title: State intensifies war on illicit tobacco
results.description: One state’s war on illegal tobacco has escalated sharply, with 15 more shops forced to lock their doors under tough new compliance powers.

results.title: African Proverb of the day: 'If you are threatened by a man, sleep at night, if it is by a woman...'
results.description: Although the wording may initially appear to focus on gender, the proverb's enduring appeal lies elsewhere. At its heart is a broader lesson about perception.

results.title: City Boy Movement terminates coordinator’s appointment ahead of 2027 elections
results.description: The City Boy Movement in Gombe state has announced the termination of the appointment of Dunijir Gatama as its state coordinator. In a statement issued on Friday, Mubarak Hamisu Usman, state director of the movement, said the decision takes immediate effect. Usman said the action followed findings that Gatama engaged in activities inconsistent with the ... The post City Boy Movement terminates coordinator’s appointment ahead of 2027 elections appeared first on Politics Nigeria .

results.title: Indian Navy Prepared for China-Pakistan Maritime Challenge, Says Admiral Dinesh K Tripathi
results.description: Indian Navy Chief Admiral Dinesh K Tripathi said the Navy is prepared for any complex 'two-front' maritime challenge involving China and Pakistan, citing major improvements in surveillance, anti-submarine warfare and operational readiness. He said the Indian Ocean Region is entering an 'era of intense competition' as India continues fleet expansion, modernization and defence self-reliance efforts.

results.title: General Subramani takes charge as new Chief of Defence Staff
results.description: General N.S. Raja Subramani assumes role as India’s Chief of Defence Staff, focusing on military transformation and tri-service integration.

results.title: UPSC Prelims 2026 Answer Key: Objection Window Closes Today At upsc.gov.in; Candidates Can Submit Challenges Till 6 PM
results.description: UPSC Prelims 2026 Answer Key Objection Window UPSC will close the Civil Services Prelims 2026 answer key objection window today at 6 PM Candidates must submit challenges through the QPRep portal with valid justification and academic references
